creator: rik@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port ftp/lftp.
http://ftp.yars.free.net/pub/source/lftp/lftp-3.5.4.tar.gz.asc file has
changed, this file from all mirrors and on the main lftp site gives checksum
that is differ from the checksum of this file in ports collection.

Fix: 

Update file on the FreeBSD master site and changes checksum in the ports tree.
How-To-Repeat: Just rebuild this port.
